creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed, thanks.

You are probably right in that it is unlikely to cause a problem.
By grepping the ports tree it looks like there is exactly one port which specifically needs libarchive from ports, namely archivers/rpm4.

In all other instances (only hydrogen-devel and rdup), the dependency is on libarchive.so, which will cause the port to use the base system installation anyway.
